organization.name: Finema
organization.description: Finema is a Thailand-based digital identity company specializing in decentralized identity and self-sovereign identity solutions. Founded in 2017, Finema provides enterprise-grade platforms for identity verification, authentication, and verifiable credentials, supporting governments and organizations in building secure, privacy-preserving, and interoperable digital services. Its solutions include identity proofing, digital wallets, and AI-driven verification, enabling trusted digital interactions.
